title: Routines
description: Recurring work definitions that materialize into auditable execution issues.

concurrency_policy.coalesce_if_active: If a run is already active, keep just one follow-up run queued.
concurrency_policy.always_enqueue: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if the routine is already running.
concurrency_policy.skip_if_active: Drop new trigger occurrences while a run is still active.

catch_up_policy.skip_missed: Ignore windows that were missed while the scheduler or routine was paused.
catch_up_policy.enqueue_missed_with_cap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.

misc.draft_saved: Draft saved. Add a default agent before enabling automation.
misc.routine_created_body: Add the first trigger to turn it into a live workflow.

empty.select_company: Select a company to view routines.
empty.no_routines: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.

composer.subtitle: Define the recurring work first. Default project and agent are optional for draft routines.
composer.advanced_delivery_subtitle: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.
composer.after_creation_hint: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger setup. Draft routines stay paused until you add a default agent.

detail.run_failed_body: Paperclip could not start the routine run.
detail.failed_update_routine_body: Paperclip could not update the routine.
detail.failed_save_routine_body: Paperclip could not save the routine.
detail.failed_add_trigger_body: Paperclip could not create the trigger.
detail.trigger_saved_body: The routine cadence update was saved.
detail.failed_update_trigger_body: Paperclip could not update the trigger.
detail.failed_delete_trigger_body: Paperclip could not delete the trigger.
detail.failed_rotate_secret_body: Paperclip could not rotate the webhook secret.
detail.default_agent_required_body: Set a default agent before enabling routine automation.
detail.save_secret_now: Save this now. Paperclip will not show the secret value again.
detail.draft_no_agent: Default agent required. This routine can stay as a draft and still run manually, but automation stays paused until you assign a default agent.

signing_modes.bearer_desc: Expect a shared bearer token in the Authorization header.
signing_modes.hmac_sha256_desc: Expect an HMAC SHA-256 signature over the request using the shared secret.
signing_modes.github_hmac_desc: Accept GitHub-style X-Hub-Signature-256 header (HMAC over raw body, no timestamp).
signing_modes.none_desc: No authentication — the webhook URL itself acts as a shared secret.

variables.heading: Variables
variables.detected_hint: Detected from `{{code}}` placeholders in the routine title and instructions.
variables.prompt_hint: Prompt the user for this value before each manual run.
variables.hint: Use `{{code}}` placeholders in the instructions to prompt for inputs when the routine runs.
